name: Sneak Attack
description: Once per turn, you can deal extra damage to one creature you hit with an attack roll if you have Advantage on the roll and the attack uses a Finesse or a Ranged weapon. You don't need Advantage if at least one of your allies is within 5 feet of the target, the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition, and you don't have Disadvantage on the attack roll. The extra damage is the same type as the weapon's, and the dice count scales with your level — see the `sneak-attack-dice` track.
